content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — release_notes.txt calls the app a "public beta" and warns of "rough edges" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/release_notes.txt:1-2)
Pierre: Apple's reviewers may reject or question a submission whose release notes explicitly describe the build as a beta with unfinished features, since App Store builds must be presented as finished products (beta distribution belongs on TestFlight). Rewrite the release notes to describe the shipped feature set positively (e.g. "This update improves task sync reliability") without referencing beta/testing status.
